description_long: This is a tan-colored tracked combat vehicle with a low, sloped turret and a prominent main cannon extending from the front. The hull is angular, with visible armor plating and detailed track assemblies on both sides, featuring multiple road wheels and a drive sprocket at the rear. On the left side, there is an external storage box and a cylindrical container, while the rear deck has a circular hatch and vent grilles. The turret is centrally mounted and features a small hatch and periscope details. The vehicle's surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible military markings or camouflage patterns. The overall design suggests a focus on protection and mobility in urban or rugged environments.
description: A tan, tracked combat vehicle with a sloped turret, main cannon, and detailed armor plating. Features external storage and rugged tracks for urban or rough terrain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tracks, main cannon, turret, and external storage box on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the circular hatch, vent grilles, and cylindrical container on the rear deck.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tracks, turret, and absence of external storage on this side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the main cannon, sloped armor, and the compact, angular profile of the vehicle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped surfaces, moderate thickness, and no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color; no visible camouflage pattern.
